sessionStartMessage: Orient quickly on this codebase. Step {step}/{total}: {label}. Do it now — don't summarize, just run the command and proceed.

steps.label: Run `cx overview .` to learn codebase orientation
steps.systemPrompt: [ORIENT GATE] You must run `cx overview .` before using any search tools. grep, find, rg, ack, ag, fd, and ck are BLOCKED until you complete this step. Do NOT produce a lengthy summary after cx overview — proceed to the next tool.
steps.blockMessage: ⚠️ [Orient 1/2] Run `cx overview .` first. Search tools blocked until done.
steps.advanceMessage: ✅ [Orient 1/2] Complete. Now run `ck --index .` (or `ck --status` if already indexed).
steps.retryMessage: ⚠️ [Orient 1/2] `cx overview .` returned no results. Try from the project root.

steps.label: Run `ck --index .` (or `ck --status`) to prepare semantic search
steps.systemPrompt: [ORIENT GATE] Run `ck --index .` (or `ck --status` if already indexed) next. grep, find, rg, ack, ag, fd are still BLOCKED. Be concise — just run the command.
steps.advanceMessage: ✅ [Orient 2/2] Complete! All tools unblocked. Use cx/ck per AGENTS.md escalation hierarchy.
